top_stories.title: Prime Intellect Releases prime-rl 0.6.0 to Train Trillion-Parameter MoE Models on Agentic RL Workloads
top_stories.description: Prime Intellect has released prime-rl 0.6.0, an open framework for asynchronous reinforcement learning on trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts models. It trained GLM-5 on SWE tasks at up to 131k sequence length, with sub-5-minute step times and 256 rollouts, on 28 H200 nodes. This breakdown covers the inference and training optimizations behind those numbers — FP8 inference, Wide Expert Parallelism, prefill/decode disaggregation, router replay, and 3-D parallelism (FSDP, EP, CP). The post...
top_stories.author: Asif Razzaq

top_stories.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
top_stories.description: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.
top_stories.content: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.

top_stories.title: Anthropic debuts Claude Tag, a more capable AI teammate that lives within Slack
top_stories.description: Anthropic PBC today unveiled a new version of its chatbot Claude that lives inside Slack, where it operates like a virtual employee. It’s called Claude Tag, and it’s designed to work across entire organizations, helping multiple employees complete tasks for related projects. It builds on existing agentic artificial intelligence tools offered by Anthropic, including Claude Code […] The post Anthropic debuts Claude Tag, a more capable AI teammate that lives within Slack appeared first on...

top_stories.title: HPE AI Factory With NVIDIA Expands for the Era of Agents
top_stories.description: Enterprises are moving agentic AI from proof of concept to production — and the next generation of AI factories are built for the era of agents. At HPE Discover Las Vegas, running through Thursday, June 18, NVIDIA and HPE are expanding the HPE AI Factory with NVIDIA, including NVIDIA Vera CPU and NVIDIA Agent Toolkit […]

top_stories.title: Accelerate campaign workflow with insights from Adobe Marketing Agent for Amazon Quick
top_stories.description: This post shows how to enable Adobe Marketing Agent for Amazon Quick using a Model Context Protocol (MCP). We walk you through how to configure the integration, authenticate using your Adobe credentials, and get the latest insights in Amazon Quick. The sample workflow returns audience rankings, loyalty segment summaries, journey usage, and conflict recommendations.
top_stories.author: Ebbey Thomas
